records.originalTurkish:
CHP GRUBU ADINA VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Değerli arkadaşlar, ben bütçe konuşmamı iki Türkiye'yi karşılaştırarak yapmak istiyorum: Bir Türkiye'de fakirlik var, işsizlik var, açlık var, yoksulluk var ama ahlak var,
edep var, çalışma var, vergi var. Bu Türkiye'de herkes yoksullukta buluşmuş, asgari ücretlinin aldığı maaş kiraya yetmiyor, emekli 12.500 TL'yle sadece yaşamaya çalışıyor. Mühendisi, öğretmeni, polisi, doktoru bu Türkiye'de geçinemiyor. Beyaz yakalı ile mavi yakalı buluşmuş durumda. Karı-koca doktor olanlar çocuklarını özel okulda okutamıyor. Artık bu insanların, doktorun, mühendisin, öğretmenin, polisin bir ev sahibi olması mümkün değil. Türkiye'de artık orta sınıf yok, en alttakiler ve en üsttekiler var. Sizleri, AK PARTİ iktidarını tebrik etmek lazım, yeni yeni deyimler kazandırıyorsunuz. Bunlardan biri "ev genci" 6 milyon 200 bin; bir diğeri "eğitimli yoksul", bir diğeri "çalışan ama yoksul". Bunlar sizin Türkiye'ye kazandırdığınız yeni deyimler. Ama öbür Türkiye'de zenginlik var, rüşvet var, hırsızlıktan dolayı israf var, şatafat var, haksız kazanç var, kaynağı belli olmayan para var ama hiç vergi yok. Emeklisi, asgari ücretlisi, esnafı, tüccarı, sanayicisi vergi ödüyor; birileri alın teri dökmeden, çalışmadan, ömründe bir gün tüccarlık yapmamış adamlar zenginleşiyor, lüks ve şatafat içinde yaşıyor ama bunun hesabını hiç kimse sormuyor.
Bakın, iki tane resmi var değerli arkadaşlar, iki resim var elimde; biri bu, diğeri bu. Değerli arkadaşlar, bu resim şehit Osman'ın evinin resmi, bu resim ise yüzsüz Osman'ın yeni yaptığı evin resmi. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Değerli arkadaşlar, burada bu tür yüzsüz Osmanlar, utanmaz Osmanlar daha rahat yaşasın diye bu Osman
şehit oluyor. Bu fotoğraftaki fakirler fukaralar yıllardır bedel ödüyorlar bunlar daha iyi koşullarda yaşasın diye.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, bu resim 5 kişinin barakada öldüğü fotoğraf. Bu fotoğrafa herkes iyi baksın; bu, Türkiye'nin fotoğrafı. Bir tarafta hırsızlık yaparak, yolsuzluk yaparak, rüşvet alarak krallar gibi yaşayanlar, diğer tarafta açlıktan yanan insanlar. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, şu ev -burada, görüyorsunuz görsellerde- tam 14.347 metrekare arsada. Detaylara birazdan geleceğim.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bu evleri konuşurken Türkiye'den birkaç örnek daha vermek istiyorum: Bakın, 20 yaşında bir üniversite öğrencisi bıyığı terlemeden taksi şoförlüğü yaparken öldürüldü. 79 yaşında bir emekli -geçinemediği için- çalışırken inşaattan düşerek öldü; birileri rahat yaşasın diye. Niye? O taksi şoförü de 79 yaşındaki emekli de birileri daha rahat yaşasın diye öldü.
Değerli arkadaşlar, Ankara Büyükşehir Belediyesini yirmi beş yıl yöneten ama rantı elinden alındığı için herkese çamur atan, iftira atan bir trol, bir Ankara bebesi var; bir de onun oğlu var Osman. Bu adam Ankara'yı parsel parsel sattığı gibi belediyenin kaynaklarını da 5-10 aile arasında pay etmiş. Tabii ki en büyük payı -şaşırmayacaksınız- kendisi almış. Hani diyor ya: "Altınpark'ı yaptım, Göksu Parkı'nı yaptım, Harikalar Diyarı'nı yaptım, Mogan'ı yaptım." Değerli arkadaşlar, burada ilginç bir durum var: Buradaki ihalelerin tamamını bir aileye vermiş; Korkutata ailesi. 2007-2017 yılları arasında Ankara Büyükşehir Belediyesi,
ASKİ ve ABB iştiraklerinden toplam 52 ihale almış bu insanlar. Bu altı yıllık süreçte 10 farklı şirket adıyla aldıkları toplam ihale, dikkatinizi çekerim, 228 milyon TL. Bugünün parasıyla ne kadar? Tam 3 milyar TL. Ankaralı fakirin fukaranın, yetimin hakkını bir aileye vermiş. Bedavaya mı vermiş? Bedavaya verir mi Melih? Vermez. Ne yapmış? Bu aileye verdiklerinin karşılığında birçok şey almış. Örneğin, hâlâ kullandığı plaka, doyamamış, yirmi beş yıldır yönetmiş, doyamamış. Ankara Büyükşehir Belediyesinin resmî plakası ne biliyor musunuz? Resmî plakası "06 ABB 01" Beyefendinin plakası ne? "06 ABB 001" Bunlar sıfır atmaya meraklı ya, bol sıfırlamaya meraklı ya değerli arkadaşlar! (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Peki, bu araba kimin? Bu arada kimin üzerine kayıtlı? Bu araba da Korkutata ailesinin üzerine kayıtlı.
Değerli arkadaşlar, gördüğünüz, biraz önce gördüğünüz şu evin arsası 4 bin metrekare olarak alınmış. Osman Gökçek almış. Kimden almış? Korkutata ailesinden. Sonra büyümüş, büyümüş, büyümüş, 14 bin metrekare olmuş değerli arkadaşlar. Peki, bu arsayı satan Korkutata kim? Şaşırmayacaksınız, Beyaz TV'nin yönetim kurulu üyesi. Allah aşkına, şimdi, AK PARTİ'lilere söylüyorum, Sayın Bakana söylüyorum: Elinizi vicdanınıza koyun değerli arkadaşlar; bir yoksulluğa bakın, yanan çocuklara bakın, bir de haksızca zenginleştirilene bakın, bir de Osman Gökçek'in malikânesine bakın. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, bu malikâneyi dünyada 3 kişi yapar:
1) Kolombiya'daki uyuşturucu baronları.
2) Arap şeyhleri.
3) Hırsızlar.
Şimdi size soruyorum: Osman Gökçek kim?
A) Uyuşturucu baronu.
B) Arap şeyhi
C) Hırsız.
Takdir sizin.
Değerli arkadaşlar, burada bir al ver var. Ankara Belediyesi bir aileye iş yeri veriyor, ihale veriyor; 52 ihale veriyor, 35'i davet usulü. Bu aile bunun karşılığında arsa veriyor, araba veriyor, başka bir şeyler de veriyor herhâlde. Peki, bu inşaatı kim yapıyor? Bingo! Bildiniz! Kim? Binko İnşaat. Binko İnşaat kim? Ankapark var ya, hayvan parkı, hani plastikten yapmışlar ya, dinozorlar var. Bakın, Türkiye tarihinde, belki dünya tarihinde belediye eliyle yapılan en büyük yolsuzluk, 810 milyon dolar. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) 810 milyon dolara ihaleyi yapan... O Binko İnşaat Osman'ın müteahhidi. Kimse kimseye beş kuruş verir mi, hele bunlar verir mi? Vermez.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, fakirin fukaranın parası bu; bu evi bulamayanların, kira ödeyemeyenlerin parası bu; emekli olup da sakız satanların parası bu. Bu para, değerli arkadaşlar, simit satanların parası, soğukta duranların parası, doğal gaz faturasını ödeyemediği için battaniyeye sarılıp yatanların parası. Kimin parası bu? Hepimizin parası, değerli arkadaşlar.
Bakın, bu konuşmayı akşam düşünürken birkaç arkadaşa sordum, Yunus Emre Hoca dedi ki: "Ya, bu konuşmayı yapma." "Niye?" dedim. "Bu, AK PARTİ için olağan bir durum yani böyle şaşılacak bir durum değil ki alışığız bu uygulamalara. Onlar zaten Gökçek ailesini biliyorlar." dedi. Ben dedim ki: "Ben sadece onlara konuşmayacağım ki onların içinde de mutlaka vicdanlı insanlar var." Bu konuşmayı kime yapacağım biliyor musunuz? Bazı değerleri kullanarak oy aldığınız hacı teyzelere yapacağım, hacı amcalara yapacağım, o gencecik çocuklara yapacağım değerli arkadaşlar. Bakın, gençler birileri iş bulamazken, birileri her gün yoksullaşırken maalesef birileri her gün haram parayla
zenginleşmeye devam ediyor. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Şimdi, hep dedik ya, burada Sayın Cumhurbaşkanı Yardımcısı Cevdet Yılmaz var, Sayın Cevdet Yılmaz bölgemizin milletvekili ve ben çok düzgün bir insan olduğunu biliyorum. Bir fakir ailenin çocuğu olarak doğmuş, cumhuriyetin imkânları sonucunda ODTÜ'de okumuş, gelmiş Cumhurbaşkanı Yardımcısı olmuş. Sayın Cumhurbaşkanı Yardımcısı, Allah aşkına, Allah aşkına, buradan bir kuruş vergi aldınız mı ya? Bakın, yanınızda Turizm Bakanı var, otelci; o vergisini ödüyor. Turizm Bakanı zengin olsa anlarsınız ya da sanayici olsa, zenginleşse anlarsınız. Allah aşkına, bir kuruş vergi var mı ya, bir kuruş vergi var mı?
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, bu adamı 2018'de görevden aldınız. Ne için görevden aldınız Sayın Abdulhamit Gül? Hani var ya bir furya, darbe, FETÖ, ortak... Hatırlıyor musunuz? Aldığınız bu adam FETÖ'cü müydü, hırsız mıydı? Muhtemelen FETÖ'cü olduğu için aldınız ama hiçbir ceza görmedi. Niye? Sustu ve Cumhuriyet Halk Partisine saldırdı, 2019'dan itibaren Mansur Yavaş'a saldırdı.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, sormak lazım; bu Beyaz TV nasıl, hangi parayla, hangi alın teriyle kurulmuş, kimin parasıyla kurulmuş, bunu sormak lazım. Allah aşkına, Allah aşkına, bakın, bir bekar adam 250 metrekare kapalı havuz niye yapar ya, 160 metrekare salonu niye yapar, 110 metrekare eğlence odasını niye yapar ya, niye yapar? (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Acaba babası onu dinozor parkına götürmediği için mi eğlence odası yapıyor? (CHP sıralarından gülüşmeler) Bu evin değeri muhtemelen 600 milyon değerli arkadaşlar. Maalesef, ülkede çivi çıkmış durumda.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Sayın Başkanım...
BAŞKAN - Bir dakika veriyorum.
Buyurun.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Arkadaşlar, eski Türkiye ile yeni Türkiye karşılaştırması yapılıyor ya; bakın, eski Türkiye'de eskiden -hatırlar mısınız, bilmiyorum- utanma duygusu vardı, utanma duygusu; ar vardı, ar; ahlak vardı, ahlak. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Şimdi, arkadaşlar, bu kadar olaydan sonra bu insanlar ne yapıyor? Hâlâ "tweet" atmaya devam ediyor. Bakın, bir milletvekiliniz SPK'deki yolsuzluğa karıştı, Kur’an-ı Kerim'le örtmeye çalıştı; sokakta gezmeye devam ediyor. Bakın, bu yeni Türkiye; yeni Türkiye'de ahlak yok, utanma yok. Eski Türkiye'ye bakın, bir bakanı hakkında yolsuzluk iddiası var diye rahmetli Özal görevden aldı ya da bir başka bakan yargılandı değerli arkadaşlar. Bakın, SPK dolandırılıyor, bir şey yok; bakan gazeteci aracılığıyla rüşvet istiyor, bir şey yok. Maalesef Türkiye'nin fotoğrafı bu, değerli arkadaşlar.
Bakın, Türkiye'nin diğer bir fotoğrafı ne biliyor musunuz? Türkiye'nin diğer bir fotoğrafını her gün sabah kuşağı programlarında izleyebilirsiniz.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Başkanım, hemen tamamlıyorum.
BAŞKAN - Yok, vermiyoruz, bir dakika verdim ben.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Peki, peki Başkanım.
BAŞKAN - Teşekkür ederim, sağ olasınız.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Değerli arkadaşlar, katilleri Müge Anlı buluyor, kaybolanları Esra Erol buluyor; adalet bakanımız Müge Anlı, içişleri bakanımız Esra Erol, aile bakanımız Didem Arslan.
Teşekkür ediyorum (CHP ve İYİ Parti sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
ON BEHALF OF THE CHP GROUP, VELI AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I greet you all with respect.
Dear friends, I want to make my budget speech by comparing two Turkeys: In one Türkiye, there is poverty, unemployment, hunger, poverty but morality.
There is decency, there is work, there is tax. In this Türkiye, everyone is in poverty, the salary of the minimum wage earner is not enough for the rent, and the retiree is just trying to live on 12,500 TL. Engineers, teachers, police and doctors cannot make a living in this Türkiye. White collar and blue collar have met. Those who are husband and wife doctors cannot send their children to private schools. It is no longer possible for these people, doctors, engineers, teachers, police officers, to own a house. There is no middle class in Türkiye anymore, there are those at the bottom and those at the top. You, the AK PARTY government, should be congratulated, you are introducing new expressions. One of these is "home youth", 6 million 200 thousand; another is "educated poor", another is "working but poor". These are the new expressions you brought to Türkiye. But in the other Türkiye, there is wealth, bribery, waste due to theft, ostentation, ill-gotten gains, money of unknown origin, but no taxes. Retirees, minimum wage earners, tradesmen, merchants and industrialists pay taxes; Some people are getting rich and living in luxury and splendor, without working hard or even working as a trader a day in their lives, but no one is held accountable for this.
Look, I have two pictures, dear friends, I have two pictures; one is this, the other is that. Dear friends, this picture is the picture of the house of the martyr Osman, and this picture is the picture of the newly built house of the brazen Osman. (Applause from the CHP benches) Dear friends, this Osman is here so that such shameless Osmans can live more comfortably.
He becomes a martyr. The poor people in this photo have been paying the price for years so that they can live in better conditions.
Dear friends, look, this is the photo where 5 people died in the barracks. Everyone should take a good look at this photo; This is a photo of Türkiye. On one side are those who live like kings by stealing, corrupting and taking bribes, and on the other side are people starving. (Applause from CHP benches)
Dear friends, look, this house - here, you can see it in the images - is on a land of exactly 14,347 square meters. I'll get to the details in a moment.
Dear friends, while talking about these houses, I would like to give a few more examples from Türkiye: Look, a 20-year-old university student was killed while working as a taxi driver without his mustache sweating. A 79-year-old retiree died by falling off a construction site while working because he could not make ends meet; so that someone can live comfortably. Why? Both that taxi driver and the 79-year-old retiree died so that someone else could live more comfortably.
Dear friends, there is a troll, an Ankara babe, who ruled the Ankara Metropolitan Municipality for twenty-five years, but slanders and slanders everyone because his income was taken away from him; He also has a son, Osman. This man not only sold Ankara parcel by parcel, but also distributed the resources of the municipality among 5-10 families. Of course - you won't be surprised - he got the biggest share. You know, he says: "I did Altınpark, I did Göksu Park, I did Wonderland, I did Mogan.

"Dear friends, there is an interesting situation here: All the tenders here were given to a family; the Korkutata family. Between 2007 and 2017, Ankara Metropolitan Municipality,
These people received a total of 52 tenders from ASKİ and ABB subsidiaries. I would like to draw your attention to the fact that the total tender they received under the names of 10 different companies in this six-year period is 228 million TL. How much is it in today's money? Exactly 3 billion TL. He gave the rights of the poor and orphans of Ankara to one family. Did he give it away for free? Will Melih give it for free? It doesn't. What did he do? He got a lot in return for what he gave to this family. For example, the license plate he still uses, he couldn't get enough of it. He's been managing it for twenty-five years and couldn't get enough of it. Do you know what the official license plate of Ankara Metropolitan Municipality is? His official license plate is "06 ABB 01". What is the gentleman's license plate? "06 ABB 001" These, dear friends, are interested in zeroing and lots of zeroing! (Applause from CHP benches) So, whose car is this? By the way, who is it registered to? This car is also registered to the Korkutata family.
Dear friends, the land of the house you just saw was purchased as 4 thousand square meters. Osman Gökçek bought it. Who did he get it from? From the Korkutata family. Then, dear friends, it grew and grew and grew and became 14 thousand square meters. So, who is Korkutata selling this land? You won't be surprised, he is a board member of Beyaz TV. For God's sake, now, I say to AK PARTY members, I say to the Minister: Put your hands on your conscience, dear friends; Look at poverty, look at the burning children, look at those who were unjustly enriched, and look at Osman Gökçek's mansion. (Applause from CHP benches)
Dear friends, look, this mansion is built by 3 people in the world:
1) Drug lords in Colombia.
2) Arab sheikhs.
3) Thieves.
Now I ask you: Who is Osman Gökçek?
A) Drug lord.
B) Arab sheikh
C) Thief.
It's up to you.
Dear friends, there is give and take here. Ankara Municipality gives a workplace to a family and awards a tender; It offers 52 tenders, 35 of which are by invitation. This family probably gives land, a car, or something else in return. So, who is doing this construction? Bingo! You guessed it! Who? Binko Construction. Who is Binko İnşaat? You know Ankapark, it's an animal park, they made it out of plastic, there are dinosaurs. Look, the biggest corruption committed by the municipality in the history of Türkiye, perhaps in the history of the world, is 810 million dollars. (Applause from CHP ranks) The one who made the tender for 810 million dollars. He is Binko İnşaat Osman's contractor. Does anyone give a penny to anyone, especially these people? It doesn't.
Dear friends, look, this is the money of the poor; This is the money of those who cannot find this house and cannot pay rent; This is the money of retired people who sell gum. This money, dear friends, is the money of those who sell bagels, the money of those who stay in the cold, the money of those who sleep wrapped in blankets because they cannot pay their natural gas bill. Whose money is this? We all have money, dear friends.
Look, while I was thinking about this speech in the evening, I asked a few friends, and Yunus Emre Hodja said: "Oh, don't make this speech." "Why?" I said. "This is a normal situation for the AK PARTY, so it is not surprising, we are used to these practices. "They already know the Gökçek family," he said.

I said: "I won't just talk to them, there are definitely conscientious people among them." Do you know to whom I will make this speech? Dear friends, I will do it to the aunts Haci, whom you get votes from by using some values, I will do it to uncles Haji, I will do it to those young children. Look, young people, while some cannot find a job, while some are becoming poor every day, unfortunately, some are living with illicit money every day.
continues to get richer. (Applause from CHP benches)
Now, as we have always said, there is Mr. Vice President Cevdet Yılmaz here, Mr. Cevdet Yılmaz is the deputy of our region and I know that he is a very decent person. He was born as a child of a poor family, studied at METU as a result of the opportunities of the republic, and became the Vice President. Mr. Vice President, for God's sake, for God's sake, have you ever collected a penny of tax from here? Look, there is the Minister of Tourism next to you, the hotelier; He pays his taxes. You would understand if the Minister of Tourism was rich, or if he was an industrialist and became rich, you would understand. For God's sake, is there a penny tax, is there a penny tax?
Dear friends, look, you dismissed this man in 2018. Why did you dismiss Mr. Abdulhamit Gül? You know, a craze, a coup, FETO, a partner. Do you remember? Was this man you bought a member of FETO or a thief? You probably took him because he was a member of FETO, but he was not punished at all. Why? He kept silent and attacked the Republican People's Party, and from 2019 onwards he attacked Mansur Yavaş.
Dear friends, look, we have to ask; We need to ask how this Beyaz TV was established, with what money, with what sweat, and with whose money it was established. For God's sake, for God's sake, look, why would a single man build a 250 square meter indoor pool, why would he build a 160 square meter living room, why would he build a 110 square meter entertainment room? (Applause from CHP benches) Is he building an entertainment room because his father won't take him to the dinosaur park? (Laughter from the CHP ranks) This house is probably worth 600 million, friends. Unfortunately, the country is out of control.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
VELİ AĞBABA (Continuing) - Mr. President.
CHAIRMAN - I'll give you a minute.
Here you go.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Friends, there is a comparison between the old Türkiye and the new Türkiye; Look, in ancient Türkiye - I don't know if you remember - there was a sense of shame, a sense of shame; There were, there were; There was morality, morality. (Applause from CHP benches)
Now, friends, what are these people doing after all this? He still continues to "tweet". Look, one of your members of parliament was involved in corruption in the CMB and tried to cover it up with the Holy Quran; He continues to walk on the street. Look, this is the new Türkiye; There is no morality, no shame in the new Türkiye. Look at the old Türkiye, dear friends, the late Özal dismissed a minister or another minister was tried because there were allegations of corruption against him. Look, CMB is being defrauded, there is nothing; The minister asks for a bribe through the journalist, but there is nothing. Unfortunately, this is the picture of Türkiye, dear friends.
Look, do you know what another photo of Türkiye is? You can watch another photo of Türkiye every day in the morning programs.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
VELİ AĞBABA (Continuing) - President, I'll finish it immediately.
CHAIRMAN - No, we do not give it, I gave it a minute.
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - Okay, okay, President.
CHAIRMAN - Thank you, thank you.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Dear friends, Müge Anlı finds the murderers, Esra Erol finds the missing ones; our minister of justice Müge Anlı, our minister of interior Esra Erol, our minister of family Didem Arslan.
Thank you (applause from CHP and İYİ Party rows)

records.originalTurkish:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bütçe görüşmeleri kayyum tartışmalarıyla başladı ve öylece bitiyor. 31 Mart seçimlerinde AKP, kurulduğundan bu yana ilk kez 2'nci parti oldu; Genel Başkanımız Sayın Özgür Özel'in liderliğinde partimiz 1'inci parti oldu. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Ne olduysa 31 Mart seçimlerinden sonra AKP'nin kimyası bozuldu, fiziği bozuldu, biyolojisi bozuldu; en son, façası da bozulmuş oldu.
Değerli arkadaşlar, önce belediyelere valileri, kaymakamları kayyum olarak atıyorlardı; sonra baktılar ki bu yemiyor, bütün anketlerde belediyeden memnuniyet yüzde 60'lara çıkmış, partimiz hâlâ her şeye rağmen 1'inci parti; yeni bir operasyon şekli buldular; bunu da yaparsa AK PARTİ yapar. Ne yaptılar? Ekonomik kayyum operasyonu yapıldı, 31 Martta çarpıldılar. Şimdi ne diyor? "CHP'li belediyeleri silkeleyin." diyor. Belediyeleri silkeleyerek Cumhuriyet Halk Partili belediyelerin halka olan hizmetini engellemeye çalışıyorlar. Buradan söyleyelim: Ne yaparsanız yapın, Cumhuriyet Halk Partili belediyeler halkına hizmet etmeye devam edecek. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Değerli arkadaşlar, para lazım. Para lazım mı? Vallahi lazım. Niye? Çünkü
çarçur ettiniz, şatafata ve israfa kullandınız. Bakın, bizim belediyeleri silkeleyeceğinize size daha iyi kaynaklar bulabilirim. Örneğin, yüzsüz Osman'ı silkeleyin; onda para çok, onda para çok. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Bulamazsanız başka adresler de bulabilirim.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bu ülkede, geldiğimiz noktada memleketin çivisi çıkmış. Türkiye'deki resmi her zaman bütçedeki rakamlara ya da istatistiklere bakarak anlayamazsınız. Bakın, Türkiye'nin bütçesinin nasıl olduğunu... En çok izlenen gündüz kuşağı programlarına bakın; ahlaksızlık var, dolandırıcılık var, katiller var, hırsız var, çocuk tecavüzü var, aldatma var, ihanet var, fuhuş var, kadına şiddet var, bahisçiler var. Ahlaki çöküntüyü ve yoksulluğu bu programlarda görebilirsiniz.
Değerli arkadaşlarım, bu programlarda sizin Bakanların görevini başkaları almış durumda. Adalet Bakanı kim? Müge Anlı; katilleri buluyor. İçişleri Bakanı kim? Esra Erol; kaybolanları buluyor. Aile Bakanı kim? Didem Arslan; çocuk tacizcilerini buluyor. Yani sizin yapamadığınız görevleri onlar yapıyor.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bu programlar ahlaki çöküntüyü açıkça gözler önüne sererken yoksulluğu da bu programlarda görmeniz mümkün. Bakın, bir örnek vereceğim, kulağımla duydum, inanamadım. Adam diyor ki: "Kaynanama tüp fırlatacaktım, tüp pahalı diye vazgeçtim." (CHP, DEM PARTİ, İYİ Parti ve Saadet Partisi sıralarından gülüşmeler) Yine, kulaklarımla duydum, ağzım açık kaldı, burası neresi dedim; bir adam çıkmış televizyona, Müge Anlı soruyor, o cevap veriyor -çok özür diliyorum hepinizden- diyor ki: "Benim karım beni satıyor." "Kaça satıyor?" diyor. "Turşuya, salçaya, bibere satıyor." diyor. Bakın, bu ülkenin gelmiş olduğu rezilliği ve ekonomik durumu görün.
Bir kadın, kocası yeni elbise almadığı için komşusunun kocasına kaçıyor değerli arkadaşlar; ağlanacak hâlimize gülüyoruz. Toplumsal yozlaşmanın ahlaki boyutlarına bakın değerli arkadaşlar.
Değerli milletvekilleri, bakın, bu memlekette enflasyon düzelir iyi bir ekonomi yönetimi gelirse; işsizlik azalır namuslu insanlar gelirse ama bu memlekette ahlak yok olmuş durumda. En büyük problemimiz, tekrar ahlakı egemen kılmak, tekrar utanma duygusunu, arı, namusu bu memlekete kazandırmak. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Çalan çaldığından utanmıyor, yapan yaptığından utanmıyor; maalesef, sokakta gezmeye devam ediyor.
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, bir de ülkemiz dünyada maalesef en alt sıralarda. Avrupa ülkeleri vize vermiyor. Bizden otuz yıl geride olan Polonya bize vize vermiyor; Fransa, Almanya vize randevusu vermiyor. Değerli arkadaşlar, Papua Yeni Gine, Pakistan ve Angola demokrasi liginde bizim önümüzde. Bakın, elinde mızrak, önünde yaprakla gezenler bizim önümüzde değerli arkadaşlar. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Tekrar söylüyorum: Elinde mızrak, önünde yaprakla gezenlerin ülkesi bizim ülkemizden daha itibarlı durumda.
Kurumlarımız da çökmüş durumda. Bir Diyanet İşleri Başkanlığı var değerli arkadaşlar, hiçbir zaman siyasetin konusu olmamıştı. Bakın, kimler geldi, kimler geçti -Lütfi Doğanlar, Ali Bardakoğlular- ama bir Başkan geldi ki değerli arkadaşlar, ne diyor? Diyor ki: "Bana bir Auidi'yi çok gördüler." Bakın, burası Ali Baba'nın çiftliği değerli arkadaşlar, burası Ali Babanın çiftliği. Uzun yola Togg'la gitmiyor. Togg'u sordun ya Sayın Güneş, uzun yola onunla gitmiyor. Niye? Daha iyi arabalar var, uzun yola onlarla gidiyor.
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
İSMAİL GÜNEŞ (Uşak) - Menzili yetmiyordur.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Başkanım, hemen bitiriyorum.
BAŞKAN - Tamamlayın lütfen.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Bakın, değerli arkadaşlar, öyle hocalar yetiştirmişler ki yahu, fetva vereceksen... Bakın, arkadaşlar, birkaç örnek vereceğim, utanarak söylüyorum: "Cennette 70 bin odalı köşkün olacak, her odada 70 bin çadır, her çadırda bir huri olacak,
gücün hiç bitmeyecek. Cennette şarap akan ırmaklar, 150 katlı yat, her katında 150 bin huri sizi karşılayacak."
NAZIM ELMAS (Giresun) - Nerede yazıyor bu?
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Diyanet diyor ki: "Fiyatları tayin eden, darlık ve bollukları veren Allah'tır; fakirlik, Allah'a yakın olmaktır."
Sayın Yenişehirlioğlu, biraz da Allah'a siz yakın olun; hep fakir fukara yakın olmaz, biraz da siz yakın olun; biraz da AK PARTİ'liler olsun, biraz da Diyanet İşleri Başkanı olsun. Bakın, israfla, şatafatla ilgili fetva vermiyor; Diyanet İşleri Başkanı "Rüşvet haramdır, alan da veren de namussuzdur." demiyor, "Şatafat, israf hem dinimizde hem ahlakımızda haramdır." demiyor, emeksiz zengin olanlarla ilgili maalesef bir şey demiyor. Ne yapıyor? Kendi şatafatına devam ediyor, israf saçmaya devam ediyor. Bu nedenle bütçenize "hayır" diyoruz. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I greet you all with respect.
Dear friends, budget negotiations started with trustee discussions and end like that. In the March 31 elections, AKP became the 2nd party for the first time since its establishment; Our party became the first party under the leadership of our Chairman Mr. Özgür Özel. (Applause from the CHP ranks) Whatever happened, after the March 31 elections, the AKP's chemistry, physics and biology were damaged; Finally, his face part was ruined.
Dear friends, first they appointed governors and district governors to municipalities as trustees; Then they realized that this did not work, in all surveys, satisfaction with the municipality increased to 60 percent, our party is still the 1st party despite everything; They found a new way of operating; If he does this, AK PARTY will do it. What did they do? An economic trustee operation was carried out, they were hit on March 31. What does he say now? "Shake off CHP municipalities." he says. By shaking down the municipalities, they are trying to prevent the services of the Republican People's Party municipalities to the public. Let's say it here: No matter what you do, municipalities affiliated with the Republican People's Party will continue to serve their people. (Applause from CHP benches)
Dear friends, we need money. Do you need money? I swear I need it. Why? Because
You squandered it and used it for ostentation and extravagance. Look, I can find better resources for you instead of shaking off our municipalities. For example, shake off the brazen Osman; He has a lot of money, he has a lot of money. (Applause from CHP benches) If you can't find it, I can find other addresses.
Dear friends, in this country, at the point we have reached, the country is out of control. You cannot always understand the picture in Türkiye by looking at the figures or statistics in the budget. See what Türkiye's budget is like. Look at the most watched daytime programs; There is immorality, there is fraud, there are murderers, thieves, child rape, cheating, betrayal, prostitution, violence against women, bookmakers. You can see moral collapse and poverty in these programs.
My dear friends, in these programs, others have taken over your Ministers' duties. Who is the Minister of Justice? Müge Anlı; finds the murderers. Who is the Minister of Internal Affairs? Esra Erol; finds the lost. Who is the Minister of Family? Didem Arslan; finds child molesters. In other words, they do the tasks that you cannot do.
Dear friends, while these programs clearly reveal moral collapse, it is also possible to see poverty in these programs. Look, I will give an example, I heard it with my own ears, I couldn't believe it. The man says: "I was going to throw a tube at my mother-in-law, but I gave up because the tube was expensive." (Laughter from the ranks of CHP, DEM PARTY, İYİ Party and Felicity Party) Again, I heard it with my ears, my mouth was open, I asked where is this place; A man appeared on television, Müge Anlı asks, she answers - I apologize to all of you - and says: "My wife is selling me." "How much does it sell for?" he says. "He sells pickles, tomato paste and pepper." he says. Look, see the disgrace and economic situation this country has reached.
Dear friends, a woman runs away to her neighbor's husband because her husband did not buy new clothes; We laugh at the point of crying. Dear friends, look at the moral dimensions of social corruption.

Dear MPs, look, inflation will improve in this country and if there is good economic management; Unemployment will decrease if honest people come, but morality has disappeared in this country. Our biggest problem is to make morality dominant again, to bring the feeling of shame, pure and honor back to this country. (Applause from CHP benches) The one who plays is not ashamed of what he plays, the one who does is not ashamed of what he does; Unfortunately, he continues to wander the streets.
Dear friends, look, unfortunately our country is at the bottom of the world. European countries do not issue visas. Poland, which is thirty years behind us, does not give us visas; France and Germany do not provide visa appointments. Dear friends, Papua New Guinea, Pakistan and Angola are ahead of us in the democracy league. Look, those who walk around with a spear in their hand and a leaf in front of them are valuable friends to us. (Applause from CHP benches) I say it again: The country of those who walk around with a spear in their hand and a leaf in front of them is in a more prestigious position than our country.
Our institutions have also collapsed. Dear friends, there is a Presidency of Religious Affairs, it has never been the subject of politics. Look, who came, who passed - Lütfi Doğanlar, Ali Bardakoğlular - but a President came, dear friends, what does he say? He says: "They've seen me a lot of Audii." Look, this is Ali Baba's farm, dear friends, this is Ali Baba's farm. He doesn't go on long trips with Togg. You asked about Togg, Mr. Güneş, he does not go on long trips with him. Why? There are better cars, he goes long distances with them.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
İSMAİL GÜNEŞ (Uşak) - His range is not enough.
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - President, I will finish immediately.
CHAIRMAN - Complete it, please.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continuing) - Look, dear friends, they have trained such teachers that if you are going to give a fatwa. Look, friends, I will give a few examples, I am ashamed to say: "You will have a mansion with 70 thousand rooms in heaven, 70 thousand tents in each room, a houri in each tent,
Your power will never end. "In heaven, rivers flowing with wine, a 150-storey yacht, and 150 thousand houris on each floor will welcome you."
NAZIM ELMAS (Giresun) - Where is this written?
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Diyanet says: "It is Allah who determines the prices and gives shortages and abundance; poverty is being close to Allah."
Dear Yenişehirlioğlu, get a little closer to God; The poor are not always close to the poor, be a little closer to them; Let it be some members of the AK PARTY, and let it be the President of Religious Affairs. Look, he doesn't give fatwas about extravagance and ostentation; President of Religious Affairs: "Bribery is haram, both the giver and the receiver are dishonorable." does not say, "Ostentation and waste are forbidden both in our religion and our morality." Unfortunately, it does not say anything about those who become rich without working. What is he doing? He continues his own pomp and waste. That's why we say "no" to your budget. (Applause from CHP benches)

records.originalTurkish:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Adalet Bakanı Sayın Yılmaz Tunç 9 Şubat 2024 tarihinde Malatya'da yaptığı açıklamada Malatya Adli Tıp Bölge Başkanlığını yatırım programına aldıklarını, bütün çevre illere hizmet edecek 16 bin metrekare kapalı alana sahip olacak, İnönü Üniversitesi bahçesinde yapılacak Adli Tıp Bölge Başkanlığı binasının inşaatının başlatılacağı açıklamasını yaptı ancak aradan iki yıl geçmesine rağmen inşaat henüz başlamamış durumda. Adli Tıp Bölge Başkanlığının önce Bulgurlu, sonra Yakınca, nihayetinde Yaka Mahallesi'nde yapılacağı açıklandı. İki yılda ancak binaya yer bulunabildi, Sayın Bakanın söylediği yerde değil farklı bir bölgede binanın yapılacağı ortaya çıktı. Adli Tıp Kurumu, bölgedeki adli tıp hizmetlerini güçlendirip hukuki süreçlere hız kazandıracak önemli bir kurum. Bir an önce Adli Tıp Kurumunun inşaatının başlamasını Sayın Bakandan Malatya halkı adına rica ediyorum.
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Minister of Justice, Mr. Yılmaz Tunç, made a statement in Malatya on February 9, 2024, stating that they included the Malatya Forensic Medicine Regional Directorate in the investment program, and that the construction of the Forensic Medicine Regional Directorate building, which will be built in the garden of İnönü University, will have a closed area of 16 thousand square meters to serve all surrounding provinces, will be started, but although two years have passed, the construction has not started yet. It was announced that the Regional Directorate of Forensic Medicine would be held first in Bulgurlu, then in Yakinca, and finally in Yaka District. It took only two years to find a place for the building, and it turned out that the building would be built in a different area, not where the Minister said. The Forensic Medicine Institute is an important institution that will strengthen forensic medicine services in the region and speed up legal processes. On behalf of the people of Malatya, I request the Minister to start the construction of the Forensic Medicine Institute as soon as possible.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
CHP GRUBU ADINA VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; öncelikle bütçenin memlekete hayırlı olmasını...
BAŞKAN - Sayın Ağbaba, o resmi -önüne geçiyorsunuz, kapatıyorsunuz- biraz kenara alın isterseniz. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Tabii.
Nasıl olsa karşımızda Sayın Başkan.
BAŞKAN - Sadece kendi grubuna anlatma arkadaş.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Savcılar tam göremedi, savcılar!
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; hepinizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Öncelikle bütçenin
memlekete hayırlı olmasını diliyorum ama hayırlı olmasını dilemek yetmez, bütçenin halkın sofrasına hayır getirmesi lazım. Getiriyor mu? İşte, temel mesele bu. Bakın, biz burada rakamları konuşuyoruz ama millet pazarda etiket konuşuyor. Biz burada hedef, program, oran konuşuyoruz; emekli evde tencere konuşuyor, asgari ücretli kira konuşuyor, çiftçi mazot konuşuyor, sanayici elektrik konuşuyor, gençlik gelecek konuşuyor. Bu bütçe kimin bütçesi; zenginin mi, yoksulun mu?
Sayın Başkan, Komisyondaki konuşmalarımda da söyledim, bu ülkede vergi alınması gerekenler yani üretmeden zenginleşenlerden yeteri kadar vergi alınmıyor. Yük kimin sırtında? Ekmek alanın, elektrik faturası ödeyenin, minibüse binip işe gidenin sırtında. Ben buradan tekrar söylüyorum: Bu ülke kâğıt üzerinde zenginleşiyormuş ama mutfakta yoksullaşıyor. Bu ülke sunumunuzda hızla büyüyor ama pazarda küçülüyor. Bu ülke grafikte iyi görünüyor olabilir ama halkın yüzü gülmüyor. Adalete inancın olmadığı bir yerde ne ekonomi düzelir ne ülkeye yatırım gelir; demokrasiyi zayıflatır. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
BAŞKAN - Sayın Ağbaba, bir saniye...
Şimdi, buradan bakıyorum, bu konuşma kameralardan sanki Mecliste yapılan bir konuşma değil gibi görünüyor. Müsaade ederseniz, şu kenara alalım, Meclis, burası da görünsün, arkanızdaki şu yazı da görünsün.
(Uğultular)
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Sayın Başkan, TRT alıyor mu acaba?
BAŞKAN - TRT'yi bilmem ben.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Meclis TV, Meclis TV?
BAŞKAN - Kavas arkadaşlar kenara alsın.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Sayın Başkan, bazen Meclis TV biz konuşurken sadece göğüsten alıyor da onu merak ediyorum.
Arkadaşlar, Meclis TV'ye de bir bakın.
BAŞKAN - Kenara alalım, kavas arkadaşlar, kenara...
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Şöyle yanıma alalım, AK PARTİ'liler de lider görsünler, buyurun. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
(Mikrofon Başkan tarafından kapatıldı)
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) -
Demokrasiyi zayıflatıp ekonomiyi güçlendiremezsiniz, hukuku askıya alıp yatırım çekemezsiniz...
(AK PARTİ ve CHP sıralarından gürültüler)
BAŞKAN - Bir saniye, bir saniye...
Arkadaşlar, yaptığımız müzakerenin Meclis Genel Kurulunda yapıldığının belli olması lazım. Onun için, kenara alırsanız, lütfen... Hem Veli Ağbaba görünür hem poster görünür hem Meclis kürsüsü görünür. Sol tarafa, şu tarafa alırsanız daha şey; biraz daha al. Tamam, eyvallah!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Başkanım, süreyi baştan başlatalım.
BAŞKAN - Veli Bey, buyurun.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - ...seçmenin iradesini tartışmalı hâle getirip toplumsal huzuru sağlayamazsınız.
19 Martta Türkiye'nin sandığına, milletin iradesine, milletin oyuna, milletin tercihine bir darbe yapıldı. Bu darbe sadece Ekrem İmamoğlu ve arkadaşlarına değil, milletin seçme hakkına yapılmıştır. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Değerli arkadaşlar, elimde bir iddianame var, 4 bin sayfa. Baştan söyleyeyim, en başından söyleyeyim: Bu iddianamede ne hukuk var; hukuk olmadığı gibi bu iddianamede ahlak da yok, vicdan da yok, namus da yok. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Bakın -bu iddianame bir ahlaki mesele- dikkatlice dinleyin, ellerinizi vicdanınıza koyun. Bu bir ahlaki mesele. Değerli arkadaşlar, suçlananlar sadece belediye başkanlarımız değil, belediye başkanlarımızın yakınları da içeride. Atadan, dededen mal varlıklarına el konuldu arkadaşlarımızın; emekli maaşlarına, tüm hesaplarına el konuldu. Harcama yapacak, simit alacak arkadaşlarımızın kredi kartı yok; baldız, bacanak, akraba, arkadaş, şoför, danışman ne varsa hepsi cezaevinde. Hepinizin vicdanına sesleniyorum, hepinizin, varsa tabii!
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Örgüt kurmuşlar demek ki.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Değerli arkadaşlar, çevrede kim varsa topladılar;
organize bir kötülük, organize bir ahlaksızlık var burada. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Değerli arkadaşlar, bakın, size bir şey söyleyeceğim: "Bu bir siyasi davadır." diyoruz "Değil." diyorsunuz. Arkadaşlar, bu iddianame matruşka gibi, matruşka; darbenin içinde darbe var, 19 Mart darbesi var, sonra iddianameden bir darbe daha çıktı. Ne diyor? "CHP'yi kapatma davası." Değerli arkadaşlar, iddianamenin 36'ncı ve 45'inci sayfalarında, bakın, burada kimin resmi var? Şu anda Kadıköy Belediye Başkanı Mesut Kösedağı'nın. Kimin var? Emrah Şahan'ın resmi var. İddiayı aynen okuyorum iddianameden, diyor ki: "İncelenen görüntülerde suç örgütü lideri Ekrem İmamoğlu isimli şahısla birlikte soruşturma kapsamında gözaltına alınan şahısların 38'inci kurultayda CHP Genel Başkanı Özgür Özel'in yanında Ekrem İmamoğlu'yla birlikte oldukları anlaşılmıştır." Ulan şuursuzlar! Dalga mı geçiyorsunuz? Birisi oy birliğiyle Divan Başkanı olmuş Ekrem İmamoğlu, bir diğeri de delegelerin oyuyla Genel Başkan olmuş Özgür Özel; dalga mı geçiyorsunuz? (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Ne diyor biliyor musun? Ne diyor? Bir Divan Başkanı... Bakın, diyor ki... (CHP sıralarından "Görüntü yok." sesleri)
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Görüntüyü düzeltsinler Başkanım.
ÖZGÜR KARABAT (İstanbul) - Hiç görünmüyor.
VELİ AĞBABA (Devamla) - Arkadaşlar, bir dakika, ben hallederim, merak etmeyin.
Bu fotoğraflar bir örgüte ya da bir suça delilse biz bu örgütün üyesiyiz, biz CHP örgütünün üyesiyiz, bundan da gurur duyuyoruz, onur duyuyoruz. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Bakın, bu "örgüt" dedikleri -şuursuzlar- kim biliyor musun? Ulusal Kurtuluş Savaşı'nı vermiş, bu örgüt 4 Eylül 1919'da kurulmuş, bu örgütün üyelerinden birisi de Sayın Numan Kurtulmuş'un dedesi; böyle suçlama olur mu?
Bakın, başka bir şey...
Bunu niye çıkardık? Burada ne yazıyor? "Özgür gelecek!" yazıyor. "Özgür gelecek!" -çekelim burayı- "Özgür gelecek!" yazıyor. Bakın, dikkatle dinleyin, yedi dakika elli dokuz saniyelik videonun 2'nci kaydında aynen şöyle yazıyor, okuyorum: "'Özgür gelecek!' pankartı açmak suretiyle..."

Bakın, milletvekilleri İstanbul il binasının önündeyken -Ali Gökçek nerede- Ali Gökçek'e yarım metreden gaz sıkılıyor, Harun Yıldızlı'ya yarım metreden gaz sıkılıyor, Tahsin Ocaklı'ya yarım metreden gaz sıkılıyor, Mahmut Tanal'a plastik mermiyle saldırılıyor. Sayın Başkan, o gaz Ali Gökçek'e sıkılmadı, Tahsin Ocaklı'ya sıkılmadı; o gaz size sıkıldı, o gaz size sıkıldı! (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)
Başkan, bir dakikada bitiriyorum sözümü.
Son olarak... Bakın, değerli arkadaşlar, arkadaşlar konuştu. Barış gelsin mi? Vallahi gelsin, barış istemeyenin evi yıkılsın. Barış gelsin ama arkadaşlar, bir taraftan PKK'yla barışıp CHP'ye savaş açarsanız toplumsal barış gelmez. (CHP sıralarından alkışlar) Bir taraftan İmralı'yla barışıp Söğütözü'yle, Saraçhane'yle kavga ederseniz, savaş ederseniz bu ülkeye barış gelmez. Bakın, Murat Emir söyledi, kent uzlaşısından arkadaşlarımız cezaevinde; Mehmet Ali Çalışkan cezaevinde, Emrah Şahan cezaevinde arkadaşlar. Yani kent uzlaşısı... Kent uzlaşısı ne? Bir Kürt siyasetçinin CHP'den aday olması. Dolayısıyla, değerli arkadaşlar, mutlaka barış sağlanmalıdır ama barış, hepimizin içine sinecek bir barış olmalıdır.
Son olarak... Oyun bitince
şahlar ile piyonları aynı kutuya koyarlar. Böbürlenme padişahım, senden büyük Allah var! (CHP sıralarından alkışlar)

ON BEHALF OF THE CHP GROUP, VELI AĞBABA (Malatya) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; First of all, the budget should be beneficial for the country.
CHAIRMAN - Dear Mr. Ağbaba, you can move that picture - you step in front of it, close it - aside for a bit if you want. (Applause from CHP benches)
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - Of course.
Anyway, Mr. President, we are here.
CHAIRMAN - Just don't tell it to your own group, friend.
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Prosecutors couldn't see clearly, prosecutors!
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I greet you all with respect.
First of all, your budget
I wish it to be good for the country, but wishing it to be good is not enough, the budget must bring good to the people's table. Does it bring? That's the basic issue. Look, we are talking about numbers here, but people are talking about labels in the market. We are talking about target, program, rate here; The retiree is talking about cooking pots at home, the minimum wage is talking about rent, the farmer is talking about diesel, the industrialist is talking about electricity, the youth is talking about the future. Whose budget is this? rich or poor?
Mr. President, as I said in my speeches at the Commission, in this country, those who should be taxed, that is, those who get rich without producing, are not taxed enough. On whose shoulder is the burden? It is on the shoulders of those who buy bread, pay electricity bills, and ride the minibus to work. I'm saying it again from here: This country is getting richer on paper, but it's getting poorer in the kitchen. This country is growing rapidly in your presentation but shrinking in the market. This country may look good on the chart, but the people are not smiling. In a place where there is no belief in justice, neither the economy nor the investment will come to the country; weakens democracy. (Applause from CHP benches)
CHAIRMAN - Mr. Ağbaba, wait a second.
Now, when I look at it from here, it looks like this speech is not a speech made in the Parliament from the cameras. If you allow, let's move it to the side, Parliament, so that this place can be seen, and this text behind you can also be seen.
(Humming)
VELİ AĞBABA (Continuing) - Mr. President, does TRT receive it?
CHAIRMAN - I don't know about TRT.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Majlis TV, Majlis TV?
CHAIRMAN - Kavas friends, take it aside.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continued) - Mr. President, sometimes Parliament TV only hears from the chest while we are talking, which makes me wonder.
Friends, take a look at Parliament TV.
CHAIRMAN - Let's move it aside, Kavas friends, aside.
VELİ AGBABA (Continue) - Let's take it with me, so that the AK PARTY members can see the leader, please. (Applause from CHP benches)
(The microphone was turned off by the President)
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) -
You cannot weaken democracy and strengthen the economy, you cannot suspend the law and attract investment.
(Noise from AK PARTY and CHP benches)
CHAIRMAN - One second, one second.
Friends, it should be clear that our discussion was held in the General Assembly of the Parliament. So, if you can put it aside, please. Both Veli Ağbaba appears, the poster appears, and the Assembly rostrum appears. If you take it to the left, to this side, something more; buy some more. OK, thank you!
ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - President, let's start the time from the beginning.
CHAIRMAN - Mr. Veli, here you go.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - You cannot ensure social peace by making the will of the voters controversial.
On March 19, a blow was made to Türkiye's ballot box, the will of the nation, the vote of the nation, and the choice of the nation.

This coup was not only done to Ekrem İmamoğlu and his friends, but also to the nation's right to choose. (Applause from CHP benches)
Dear friends, I have an indictment, 4 thousand pages. Let me say it from the beginning, let me say it from the very beginning: There is no law in this indictment; Just as there is no law, there is no morality, conscience or honor in this indictment. (Applause from CHP benches) Look - this indictment is a moral issue - listen carefully, put your hands on your conscience. This is a moral issue. Dear friends, it is not only our mayors who are accused, but also our mayors' relatives are inside. The assets of our friends, from their ancestors and grandfathers, were confiscated; Their pensions and all their accounts were confiscated. Our friends who will spend money and buy bagels do not have credit cards; Sister-in-law, brother-in-law, relative, friend, driver, counselor, everyone is in prison. I appeal to the conscience of all of you, all of you, if you have any!
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - It seems they have established an organization.
VELİ AĞBABA (Malatya) - Dear friends, they gathered everyone around;
There is organized evil, organized immorality here. (Applause from CHP benches)
Dear friends, look, I will tell you something: "This is a political case." We say, "It's not." you say. Friends, this indictment is like a matryoshka; There is a coup within a coup, there is the March 19 coup, and then another coup emerged from the indictment. What does it say? "The case of closing down the CHP." Dear friends, on the 36th and 45th pages of the indictment, look whose picture is here? It currently belongs to Kadıköy Mayor Mesut Kösedağı. Who has it? There is a picture of Emrah Şahan. I'm reading the claim verbatim from the indictment, it says: "In the images examined, it was understood that the people detained within the scope of the investigation, together with the person named Ekrem İmamoğlu, the leader of the criminal organization, were with Ekrem İmamoğlu, next to CHP Chairman Özgür Özel, at the 38th congress." Oh, you unconscious people! Are you kidding? One of them is Ekrem İmamoğlu, who became the President of the Council unanimously, and the other is Özgür Özel, who became the Chairman with the vote of the delegates; Are you kidding? (Applause from CHP benches)
Do you know what he says? What does it say? A President of the Council. Look, he says. (Sounds of "No video." from CHP benches)
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - They should correct the image, President.
ÖZGÜR KARABAT (Istanbul) - It is not visible at all.
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - Friends, wait a minute, I will handle it, don't worry.
If these photos are evidence of an organization or a crime, we are members of this organization, we are members of the CHP organization, we are proud and honored. (Applause from CHP benches)
Look, do you know who this "organization" - the unconscious ones - is? He fought in the National Liberation War, this organization was founded on September 4, 1919, one of the members of this organization is Mr. Numan Kurtulmuş's grandfather; Is such an accusation possible?
See, something else.
Why did we remove this? What does it say here? "Free will come!" writes. "Free will come!" -let's move here- "Free will come!" writes. Look, listen carefully, in the second recording of the seven minutes and fifty-nine seconds video, it says exactly as follows: "'The free future!' by unfurling the banner."
(Noise from CHP benches)
GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Oh, bring that camera here, brother, bring the camera!

CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - What are you hiding? (Noise from AK PARTY benches)
CHAIRMAN - Friends, it is clear how wide tolerance we act.
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - If not, let me put it in front of you. Mr. President, I will take it before me.
CHAIRMAN - Would you allow me?
In the history of the Parliament, while the speaker was speaking, there was no image behind him other than the image you see of the Parliament. (Noise from CHP benches) He can put it in front of himself, he can put it next to him; That's why I warned him. There is no problem if he puts it on the side, but I'm sorry, it has never been like this in the history of this Parliament. In other words, it must be obvious that the speech was made in the Parliament. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - I continue, he says, look, I read it verbatim from the indictment: "'Free will come!' When this banner, which they had planned in advance, was opened, we all said in unison, 'We will see beautiful days, sunny days; 'Free President, Özgür President, who will drive the engines to the blue.' saying that they will take over the power in the country and change the administration; "It is understood that they are planning to make Ekrem İmamoğlu, chosen by the organization, the President of this country." Is it true? (Applause from CHP benches)
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - That's right.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continuing) - I swear it's true, it's true. We are thinking of winning these elections, we are thinking of destroying you, we are fighting. (Applause from CHP benches) Yes, as it says here: Free will come, Free will come,
It will come free! (Applause from CHP benches, noise from AK PARTY rows)
Look, friends, another disgrace; Dear friends, look, under the leadership of our esteemed President, we will make Ekrem İmamoğlu, who you feared in prison and who defeated you 4 times, the President of this country, no matter what you do. (Applause from CHP benches)
Look, we keep going, we keep doing the disgrace. Again, if you have a conscience, if you have even a little human feeling inside you, I will tell you something: Friends, for nine months they slandered our pro-government media, writers, cartoonists, TRT, A Haber and TGRT friends, even though there was no indictment. Look, dear friends, he says to our GOP President, our Gaziosmanpaşa Mayor: "A secret safe was found in the CHP Mayor's office - look, I appeal to all of you conscience - bales of money were found inside." Friends, this safe is in the municipality building, the AK PARTY Mayor took it; Then we opened the report and read it. Do you know what it says? "The safe is sealed with 'harddisk'." Is it possible to have such immorality, such dishonor, such dishonesty? (Applause from CHP benches)
Come on, look, Ekrem İmamoğlu has a conservation manager, he is from Giresun, he has a house in the plateaus of Giresun, he has a one-room house. Do you know what TRT says? "Dollars came out of the safe at his house." he says. Do you know where he got the safe?
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Is it a lie?
VELI AGENDA (Continue) - Lie, disgraceful, lie; lie shameless, lie! (Noise from AK PARTY ranks) Do you know what came out of the safe? I'm reading from the minutes, it says:
"There were 47 bullets." he says, "47 bullets were found." he says.
Look, "There are 560 billion bribes." They said, but it didn't come out. Giving the names of our friends, "Secret meetings were held, money was moved." They said, but it didn't come out.

"There's money in the suitcase too." They said, "jammer" came out. You said it too.
Look, we all look face to face, is there a member of parliament here who will take a bribe? (Sounds of "Yes, it's you." from the AK PARTY rows)
Look in the mirror, look in the mirror! Who knows bribery, who knows business follow-up? You know. (Laughter and applause from the CHP benches) Shamelessly, for days, it was reported in the pro-government media and on the television channels you feed, "1,200 telephones were distributed to the congress delegates." Now I'm going to speak out.
ÇİĞDEM ERDOĞAN (Sakarya) - Gray! How else will you break it?
VELI AGENDA (Continuing) - Damn, where is it? where is the mobile phone?
"İmamoğlu has a luxury car." They said, another deputy appeared.
MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - Very polite, keep it up, very polite(!)
VELİ AĞBABA (Continued) - Cem Küçük "2 million dollars were found under the parquet in Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality's Florya Facilities." he said. What came out? "I can lie sometimes." he said.
MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - They are expressing from within you, what should we do?
VELI BROTHER (Continue) - Dear friends, think, look, you all have families, you all have children; I respect all of you, I respect your families, I respect your mothers and fathers. Look, when I see the child of an AK Party MP, I act like my own child. Friends, these people have families, relatives; His children go to school, he sees his father on TV in the evening with this, he sees with this, he sees with this, he sees with this! (Applause from CHP benches) Isn't this the right of the people, isn't this a sin? What if this conspiracy is established?
Look, friends, I say to all of you - you have children, you have relatives - God forbid anyone should be put in this situation: Look, we have seen many lawsuits in the past, we have seen many lawsuits here. Look, here we are again at the same time - Sledgehammer, we are going to Ergenekon -
All of you call us "Coupist!" you were saying. Those at this Turkish Armed Forces headquarters were declared a terrorist organization by court decision; The Chief of General Staff of the Turkish Armed Forces received 2 aggravated life sentences, you all applauded. Look, those who stand against injustice today will write history tomorrow, and those who oppose injustice will also be written in history. History writes the unlawful acts you committed yesterday in Sledgehammer, Ergenekon, military espionage, ODATV and KCK. Please look, we will meet again, then you will be ashamed again. (Applause from CHP benches)
Look, friends, I am appealing to all of you's conscience once again: In which context, in which morality, in which law, in which religion is it possible to confiscate the pension and credit card of İmamoğlu's father, Hasan İmamoğlu? In which context, in which morality, in which law, in which religion is there a reason to confiscate Dilek İmamoğlu's passport? In which religion, in which morality, in which law, in which religion is it possible to threaten Rıza Akpolat's wife and imprison his friends? Under what law, what morality, what law, what religion is there a reason to keep Zeydan Karalar in Silivri, even if he is punished - which will be released today? (Applause from the CHP ranks) Is there any suspicion of escape for Muhittin Böcek, who is trying to survive by taking 23 medications? If you send Muhittin Böcek, will he go? And these people are detained.
Dear friends, do you know who else is detained?

Necati Özkan, the boss of Öykü Agency, which is very important and does a lot of work for the state, is detained; There is nothing about it. Who is detained? President of the Reform Institute, Mehmet Ali Çalışkan, is detained; There is no indictment regarding Mehmet Ali Çalışkan, it is an indictment.
What? Urban reconciliation. Look, friends,
Kadriye Kasapoğlu is in prison for organizing Ekrem İmamoğlu's meetings. The curse of his son Çınar will burn all of you and those who made this decision. (Applause from CHP benches)
Friends, look, what started this case? It started with secret witnesses. What was it? There was "oak". İmamoğlu was arrested based on Meşe's statements, in the indictment, "Meşe" went and "İlke" came. What Meşe said is the same as what İlke said, then İlke probably couldn't stand it, went crazy, tried to commit suicide, and withdrew. Then, dear friends, Ahmet Taşçı says the following, I read it verbatim: "I do not want to offend anyone. I regret it, I withdraw from secret testimony." Dear friends, the indictment collapses. Look, don't feel sorry for this country, friends. Look, this country belongs to all of us; This country belongs to all of us, right and left. Today, you have turned the state into a party, the judiciary into a palace, and the prosecutor into a political hitman.
Look, I just said, I accuse all of you. Yesterday was the anniversary of Ahmet Tatar's death. Do you know who pulled the trigger of the bullet fired into Ahmet Tatar's head? Who shot it? (Sounds of "Ali Tatar" from CHP benches) You suffered with FETO, you suffered with FETO, together. Sorry, Ali Tatar. You pulled the trigger of the bullet fired into Ali Tatar's head together with FETO.
Dear friends, let's talk a little about political tolerance. Look, in the past, Demirel, Ecevit, Türkeş, Erbakan, these were political rivals; Özal and Demirel did not talk; Many of them had fights with Erdal İnönü, but what was it? There was political satire. Dear friends, look - Harun Yıldızlı showed it yesterday, another friend from HDP showed it - would you look at this? Is there anyone today who would dare to draw this? Look, Demirel, Ecevit, Erbakan; Demirel, Özal, Özal.
Now, dear friends,
look at this: What is this? Plastip Show. Who are there? There is İnönü, there is Yılmaz, there is Erbakan, there is Ecevit, there is Demirel. In the 1990s, they would make television programs about these and everyone would laugh, and no one would think of filing a lawsuit. What else would happen, friends? Look, what else would happen? Caricatures of these people were drawn. The late Özal, of whom I was honored to be a fellow citizen, used to hang these cartoons in the Prime Ministry building. Unfortunately, we have lost this feeling.
Look, I recently thanked a minister for what was done to Malatya. There is so much political tension that the minister brought this to the whole of Türkiye. It seems like an abnormal situation. You brought this country to this state.
Dear friends, Musa Kart drew a cartoon with a cat figure, you judged the man; You closed Penguin magazine because it drew a cartoon called "Animal World"; You arrested children because METU students opened a banner. Just this summer, friends, just this summer Leman magazine was going to be lynched because of a cartoon, we almost experienced the second Madımak. Do you know why, why? Because irresponsible politicians, the Minister of Internal Affairs made a statement about this.

The men say: "That is not our goal, our goal is to protect the rights of the children who were brutally murdered by Israel." Can anything else be considered? You put the men in prison, they've probably just been released.
Look, friends, you say "strong leader", a strong leader does not show his power to the innocent, a strong leader does not show his power to his political rival, a strong leader shows his power to Tom Barrack, who is trying to set us up like a colonial governor, he shows it to Trump, he shows it to Netanyahu. (Applause from CHP benches)
Look, I'll tell you something: Mr. Erdoğan sued 55,354 people in one year. Now, friends, just before
Hüseyin Kocabıyık, who was sitting behind the President - I never forget the oath ceremony of Hüseyin Kocabıyık - spent seventy-two days in prison for insulting the President, and was released the day before. What did Hüseyin Kocabıyık say? "AK PARTY distributes something to everyone." Is it true? TRUE. "They gave it to me too, they made my wife governor, but they took it back because I objected to some things. Everyone was put into a relationship of interest with the state in some way, some's wife, some's son, son-in-law; this is the system. Erdoğan cannot be a candidate without İmamoğlu coming out, otherwise the election loses its legitimacy." he said.
Dear friends, Hüseyin Kocabıyık was thrown into prison as an example. Do you know who? Not to this group, but to you. Tomorrow Özlem Zengin "It is not right to leave the Istanbul Convention." They kicked out Hüseyin Kocabıyık so that you wouldn't say anything. (Applause from CHP benches) Abdullah Güler, they are intimidating you; You get confused and say "law" from time to time, you get confused and say "law", they threw out this Hüseyin Kocabıyık to teach you a lesson so that you don't say "law" again. Mr. Yenişehirlioğlu, they are setting you up, all of you, with this Hüseyin Kocabıyık, otherwise what do we care? (Applause from CHP benches)
Look, dear friends, Fatih Altaylı. What does it say? "Threatening the President." First of all, there is no such crime. Fatih Altaylı was going to try to kill the President. Well, he has been in prison for months for such nonsense, he was sentenced to four years in prison. Look, there is a concept in law called "uncommitted crime", you invented an impossible crime.
Tele1 Editor-in-Chief Merdan Yanardağ. Do you remember in the past, you had Hodja Fetullah Gülen, with whom you carried out operations arm in arm, you did them together, Merdan Yanardağ was in prison for those operations, Merdan Yanardağ was in prison for espionage. Oh, will it work? Look, they have many spies, you know; There were spies in Büyükada, they closed down, they make up many spies and all of them unfortunately.
Enver Aysever. Enver Aysever
Who does he insult the most? Who does he curse the most? It does to us. Guys, will Enver Aysever be put in prison because of this "tweet" he sent? You have done a disservice to the country. I swear, you are either crazy or something else has happened. Come to your senses, friends, you have destroyed the reputation of the country. (Applause from CHP benches)
Now, let's get to the numbers, friends. For the national income per capita in 2025, our esteemed Vice President and fellow citizen Cevdet Yılmaz said "17,748 dollars"; Like Zaytung news, like Zaytung news.
MUSERREF PERVİN TUBA DURGUT (Istanbul) - Last six seconds.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Dear friends, 63 thousand liras per month.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - The time has expired when it comes to the country.
CHAIRMAN - Mr. Ağbaba, complete.
Here you go.
VELİ AĞBABA (Continuing) - Mr. President, thank you.
Dear friends, look - where is that cartoon - read this cartoon, it says: "I guess I'm either not a national or a person." The national income per capita is 17,748 dollars. Dear friends, this is not the reality of life; Do you know what the truth of life is? The truth of life - Parliament TV does not show this - this is the truth of life: Children burned to death due to lack of money, 3 children; children burning to death. (Applause from CHP benches) Do you know what the truth is? It's not $17,748; real, hotel-staying retirees; our real, burning children; real, 16 year old child laborer, murder; That's the truth, not the real $17,748.
Look, let me tell you: Mr. Vice President - he is from Bingöl - there is a beautiful tea house in Genç, the municipality's tea house, a beautiful garden. If he went there, he would say, "Dear retirees, we increased the national income per capita to 17,748 dollars this year." If he said, I swear to God, those retirees would chase Cevdet Yılmaz with a cane. (Applause from the CHP benches) Dear Minister of Treasury and Finance, if only Gercüş could get this figure.
If he told his villagers, I swear he would throw slippers at you. Well, it's out of pocket because this number and the realities of life are different.
Dear friends, look, I want to tell a joke to Mehmet Şimşek so that I can explain it well to you. Now, Temel comes, feeling bored and demoralized, with his face downcast; his friends say to Temel: "What happened, Temel?" Temel said, "Don't ask, I couldn't sell my car, my car has 500 thousand kilometers." he says. His friends said, "Look at what you think, we will go, adjust the mileage, reduce it to 50 thousand." they say and reduce it to 50 thousand. The next day, Temel comes walking, sees his friends, whistles, laughs, has fun, his friends ask: "What happened, Temel, did you sell the car?" They say, and Temel says, "Ula, are you crazy or crazy? Can a car with 50 thousand kilometers be sold?" he says. (Applause from the CHP benches; laughter from the CHP, DEM PARTY, İYİ Party and YENİ YOL rows)
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
CHAIRMAN - Complete it now, please.
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - Okay.
This is the relationship between Mehmet Şimşek and TÜİK, friends. (Laughter and applause from the CHP ranks) It is not important that you believe in TUIK, but unfortunately retirees, workers and civil servants cannot receive a raise, dear friends.
Look, let me show you the child thing, this is very important, friends: As we say, Türkiye's reality; 71 out of every 100 children cannot buy clothes, 72 out of every 100 children do not have a second pair of shoes, and 77 out of every 100 children cannot eat fresh fruits and vegetables a day. 63 out of every 100 children cannot eat meat. 77 out of every 100 children have not ridden a bicycle.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - This is not true, for what reason?
VELİ AĞBABA (Continue) - Look at TURKSTAT, TURKSTAT! Yaşar, you don't understand these, numbers are my job.
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - According to what?
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - Numbers are my job, you know. (Applause from CHP benches)
YAŞAR KIRKPINAR (İzmir) - According to what, according to what data? Where did you get that information?
VELI BROTHER (Continued) - Now, friends, God says to none of us, God says to nobody, "Buy me a hamburger."

May God not make any of us, no citizens, no mothers or fathers experience that feeling when their children say, "Buy some pants."
But you are responsible for this order. I hope we will destroy this system. (Applause from CHP benches)
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
VELI BROTHER (Continuing) - President, I will finish immediately.
CHAIRMAN - I am extending it for the last time, please finish it.
VELİ AGBABA (Continue) - Now, Mr. Numan Kurtulmuş thought that it would not be Mr. Numan Kurtulmuş's turn, but since we have given this time, let's tell him too.
Mr. President, you are not only responsible for the law of the deputies in the AK Party Group, you are not only a Speaker of the Parliament responsible for the law of the government. Look, while the MPs are in front of the Istanbul provincial building - where is Ali Gökçek - Ali Gökçek is gassed from half a meter away, Harun Yıldızlı is gassed from half a meter, Tahsin Ocaklı is gassed from half a meter, Mahmut Tanal is attacked with rubber bullets. Mr. President, that gas was not sprayed on Ali Gökçek, it was not sprayed on Tahsin Ocaklı; That gas was sprayed on you, that gas was sprayed on you! (Applause from CHP benches)
President, I will finish my speech in a minute.
Finally. Look, dear friends, friends have spoken. Will peace come? I swear to God, let the house of those who do not want peace be destroyed. Let peace come, but friends, if you make peace with the PKK and declare war on the CHP, social peace will not come. (Applause from CHP benches) On the one hand, if you make peace with İmralı and fight and fight with Söğütözü and Saraçhane, peace will not come to this country. Look, Murat Emir said, our friends from urban reconciliation are in prison; Mehmet Ali Çalışkan is in prison, Emrah Şahan is in prison, friends. In other words, urban reconciliation. What is urban consensus? A Kurdish politician becoming a candidate from CHP. Therefore, dear friends, peace must be achieved, but the peace must be a peace that will be felt by all of us.
Finally. When the game is over
They put kings and pawns in the same box. Do not boast, my sultan, there is a God greater than you! (Applause from CHP benches)
